prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fashion campaign portrait titled BLACK WIND. A solitary East Asian woman stands in a windswept open grassland under a heavy overcast sky, framed from mid-thigh upward in a low-angle editorial composition. She wears a fitted black ribbed turtleneck top and a long flowing black skirt or dress, with her hands held behind her back; her head is turned in profile to the right, eyes closed, calm and introspective. Her very long black hair is blown dramatically to the left by strong wind, with many fine strands trailing across the cloudy sky. The background shows dark rolling hills and moody moorland, with tall dry grasses in the extreme foreground blurred by shallow depth of field and motion, partially crossing the lower center of the image. Use muted cool film tones, blue-gray clouds, soft natural diffused light, subtle grain, realistic skin, high-fashion editorial styling, atmospheric wind movement, and a slightly underexposed dramatic look. Add minimalist thin white typography centered near the bottom: large widely spaced text “BLACK WIND”, below it smaller spaced text “WIND FIELD PORTRAITS”, and a third tiny line “SILENCE MOVES WITH THE WIND”. Keep the design clean with no logos or watermarks, portrait aspect ratio 9:16, photographic realism, and ensure the wind, hair, grasses, and clouds define the mood.
promptEn: Create a vertical cinematic fashion campaign portrait titled BLACK WIND. A solitary East Asian woman stands in a windswept open grassland under a heavy overcast sky, framed from mid-thigh upward in a low-angle editorial composition. She wears a fitted black ribbed turtleneck top and a long flowing black skirt or dress, with her hands held behind her back; her head is turned in profile to the right, eyes closed, calm and introspective. Her very long black hair is blown dramatically to the left by strong wind, with many fine strands trailing across the cloudy sky. The background shows dark rolling hills and moody moorland, with tall dry grasses in the extreme foreground blurred by shallow depth of field and motion, partially crossing the lower center of the image. Keep the design clean with no logos or watermarks, portrait aspect ratio 9:16, photographic realism, and ensure the wind, hair, grasses, and clouds define the mood.
promptZh: 创作一张竖构图的电影感时尚广告肖像，标题为 BLACK WIND。一位孤独的 东亚女性 站在风中开阔的草地上，头顶是厚重的阴云，采用低角度的编辑构图，取景范围从大腿中部向上。她身穿黑色修身罗纹高领上衣和黑色长裙，双手背在身后；头部向右侧转呈侧脸，双眼微闭，神情平静且内敛。她极长的黑发被强风吹向左侧，呈现出戏剧性的动态，许多细碎的发丝掠过阴云密布的天空。背景是暗色起伏的丘陵和忧郁的荒原，极近景处的高大干草因浅景深和运动模糊而虚化，部分遮挡在画面下方中心。采用柔和的冷色调胶片风格、蓝灰色云层、柔和的自然漫射光、细腻的颗粒感、真实的皮肤质感、高级时装编辑风格、充满氛围感的风动效果，以及略微欠曝的戏剧性视觉。在底部中心添加极简的细体白色排版：大号且字间距宽的文字 “BLACK WIND”，下方是较小且有间距的文字 “WIND FIELD PORTRAITS”，以及第三行微小的文字 “SILENCE MOVES WITH THE WIND”。保持设计简洁，无 Logo 或水印，肖像比例为 9:16，追求摄影写实主义，并确保风、发丝、草地和云层共同营造出独特的氛围。
